title: dudleya abramsii subsp. setchellii
intro: Dudleya abramsii subsp. setchellii, also known as Setchell's live forever or Setchell's dudleya, is a rare and endangered succulent plant species belonging to the family Crassulaceae. The plant has been found to have medicinal properties, including its ability to inhibit the growth of certain bacteria and fungi, which can be used to treat wounds and infections. The health benefits of Dudleya abramsii subsp. setchellii include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve immune function, and exhibit antioxidant properties. It is used in herbal preparations, often in the form of a tincture or salve, to promote wound healing and skin health, although more research is needed to fully understand its effects.
